user.title: BFE Rückliefertarif — choose utility
user.description:
## 2026 Swiss feed-in tariffs overview

| Utility | Base price | HKN payment (opt-in) | Billing |
|---|---|---|---|
| EKZ | Reference market price | up to 3.00 Rp/kWh | Quarterly |
| BKW | Reference market price | up to 2.00 Rp/kWh (naturemade star) | Quarterly |
| CKW | Reference market price | up to 3.00 Rp/kWh | Quarterly |
| Groupe E | Reference market price | up to 4.00 Rp/kWh | Quarterly |
| Romande Energie | Reference market price | 0.00 (1.50 only Q1 2026) | Quarterly |
| SAK | Reference market price | up to 3.00 Rp/kWh | Quarterly |
| SGSW | Reference market price | up to 3.00 Rp/kWh | Quarterly |
| ewz | Fixed price 12.91 Rp/kWh | included in base price | Quarterly |
| IWB | Fixed price 14.00 Rp/kWh | included in base price | Quarterly |
| SIG | Fixed price 10.96 Rp/kWh (at cap) | 0.00 | Quarterly |
| AEW | Fixed price 8.20 Rp/kWh (HKN included) | 0.00 | Quarterly |
| Other / Custom | — | — | — |

Your selection pre-fills the next step — every value remains editable.

tariff.title: Tariff configuration ({utility_name})
tariff.description: Configure how your utility calculates feed-in compensation. Every value comes pre-filled from the utility you picked — adjust as needed.

data_description.anlagenkategorie:
Sets the legal minimum compensation (EnV Art. 12) and compensation cap (StromVV Art. 4) automatically. Overview:
• ≤30 kW with self-consumption: min 6.00 / max 10.96 Rp/kWh
• ≤30 kW feed-in only: min 6.00 / max 8.20
• 30–<100 kW with self-consumption: min 1.20–6.00 (180÷kW) / max 10.96
• 30–<100 kW feed-in only: min 6.20 / max 8.20
• 100–<150 kW with self-consumption: min 1.20–6.00 (180÷kW) / max 7.20
• 100–<150 kW feed-in only: min 6.20 / max 5.40
• ≥150 kW with self-consumption: no min. / max 7.20
• ≥150 kW feed-in only: no min. / max 5.40
data_description.installierte_leistung_kw: Only required for 30–<150 kW plants with self-consumption — the minimum compensation follows the formula 180 ÷ kW. Leave at 0 for other plant categories.
data_description.basisverguetung: Reference market price: most utilities (EKZ, BKW, CKW, SAK, SGSW, Groupe E, Romande Energie). Fixed price: ewz, IWB, SIG, AEW.
data_description.hkn_verguetung_rp_kwh: Payment for HKN (Herkunftsnachweise — Swiss guarantees of origin). Opt-in at most utilities — set to 0.0 if you don't sell your HKN to your utility. Example EKZ: up to 3.00 Rp/kWh after enrolling on myEKZ. If the base price + HKN payment exceeds the compensation cap, the utility reduces the HKN payment automatically to the cap.
data_description.fixpreis_rp_kwh: Only used when the base price is set to 'Fixed price'. The flat per-kWh rate your utility pays. 2026 examples: ewz 12.91, IWB 14.00, SIG 10.96, AEW 8.20.
data_description.abrechnungs_rhythmus: Match your utility's invoice cycle. Most Swiss utilities settle quarterly.

entities.title: Home Assistant entity wiring
entities.description: Link the kWh counter for your grid export and the CHF sensor that the Energy Dashboard auto-creates.

data_description.stromnetzeinspeisung_kwh: The kWh counter that tracks energy fed into the grid. Must already be wired into the Energy Dashboard under 'Return to grid'.
data_description.rueckliefervergutung_chf: The CHF sensor that the Energy Dashboard auto-creates when you configure 'Return to grid with a price' (usually named `sensor.YOUR_GRID_EXPORT_compensation`). This integration writes into its Long-Term Statistics.
data_description.namenspraefix: Prefix for this integration's diagnostic sensors and action buttons (e.g. `sensor.PREFIX_basisverguetung`, `button.PREFIX_recompute_aktuelles_quartal`). Only change if the default collides.

error.kw_required_for_degressive: Installed power (kW) is required for 30–<150 kW plants with self-consumption — federal law uses the formula 180 ÷ kW to set the minimum compensation.
error.fixpreis_required: Fixed price must be greater than 0 when the base price is set to 'Fixed price'.

init.title: Adjust tariff settings
init.description: Edit your tariff configuration. Entity wiring is unchanged — to rewire entities, remove and re-add the integration.

data_description.anlagenkategorie: Sets the legal minimum compensation (EnV Art. 12) and compensation cap (StromVV Art. 4) automatically.
data_description.installierte_leistung_kw: Only required for 30–<150 kW plants with self-consumption (formula 180 ÷ kW).
data_description.basisverguetung: Reference market price for most utilities; fixed price for ewz/IWB/SIG/AEW.
data_description.hkn_verguetung_rp_kwh: Payment for HKN (Herkunftsnachweise). Set to 0.0 if you don't sell HKN to your utility. Cap binds automatically when base + HKN exceeds the compensation cap.

error.kw_required_for_degressive: Installed power (kW) is required for 30–<150 kW plants with self-consumption.
error.fixpreis_required: Fixed price must be greater than 0 when the base price is set to 'Fixed price'.
